reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  scanf_s is a Microsoft-specific extension and not supported by standard GCC compilers, causing a compilation error; use scanf instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  scanf_s is a Microsoft-specific extension and not part of the standard C library; it causes a compilation error on standard compilers like GCC. Replace with scanf.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [scanf_s is not standard in all compilers (e.g., GCC); should use scanf instead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The function 'scanf_s' is not standard in all C environments (e.g., GCC on Linux) and may cause compilation errors. The reference program uses 'scanf', which is portable.]
